issue_title: fix the organization members list not updating after removing a user
issue_body_preview: This PR fixes the organization members list not updating after removing a user. It passes refetchMembers down to each member row and calls it after a successful deletion, matching the existing pattern used by the invitations component.
test_description_zh: 在组织成员管理页面中，邀请一个成员或确认已有多个成员，然后对其中一个成员执行删除操作，观察删除成功后成员列表的变化。
expected_result_zh: 删除成员操作成功后，组织成员列表应立即自动刷新，被删除的成员应从列表中消失，无需手动刷新页面。
